'''Pefederan Lloyn''' was the [[Chairman/Legends|chairwoman]] of the [[Galactic Alliance Finance Council]] as of [[40 ABY/Legends|40 ABY]]. Prior to the [[Second Galactic Civil War]], [[Gender/Legends|she]] sold off her holdings on [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]] and replaced them with new property on [[Kuat/Legends|Kuat]], violating the theory that Financial officers were to be unable to have direct control over their holdings during their time in office.

==Appearances==
*''[[Legacy of the Force: Betrayal]]'' {{1stm}}

==Sources==
*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
